Immerse yourself in the awe-inspiring beauty of Piazza dei Miracoli, home to magnificent monuments such as the Cathedral, Baptistery, Monumental Graveyard, and the iconic Leaning Tower. Your knowledgeable guide will share fascinating stories and historical insights as you explore this UNESCO World Heritage Site.

column23: Leaning Tower of Pisa, Piazza del Duomo Piazza dei Miracoli, 56126, Pisa Italy
column24: Finally, you'll visit the world-famous Leaning Tower of Pisa, discovering all its secrets and enjoying fun photo opportunities. column23: Pisa, Pisa, Province of Pisa, Tuscany

Take advantage of this opportunity to create lasting memories in this enchanting city.

Return to Florence at the designated meeting point. Conclude your half-day adventure as you return to Florence, filled with unforgettable memories of your journey to Pisa. Bid farewell to your guide and fellow travelers, and cherish the experiences shared during this remarkable excursion.
